zh.lifeSummary: 當Margerie Colmer於1500年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德時，她的父親Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury80歲，母親Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux76歲。她於1522年與John Houghton在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1572年在英國英格蘭哈普爾享年73歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margerie Colmer于1500年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury80岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux76岁。她于1522年与John Houghton在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1572年在英国英格兰哈普爾享年73岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Colmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from one of more of the numerous places with this or a similar name, such as Colmer in North Huish (Devon), Colemore (Hampshire), and Colmer Farm in Marshwood (Dorset), from Old English cōl ‘cool’ + mere ‘pool, pond’.
Altered form of German Kollmer, a habitational name from Colmar in Alsace (formerly written Kolmar), or perhaps of Gollmer .

variants.name: Gollmer
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Golm or Golme.

nameMeanings.name: Margerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Margary
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Margerie Colmer was born in 1500, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury, was 80 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, was 76. She married John Houghton in 1522, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1572, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margerie Colmer est née en 1500, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury, avait 80 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, avait 76 ans. Elle a épousé John Houghton en 1522, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1572, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margerie Colmer 1500 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury 80 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux 76. Sie hat 1522 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom John Houghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1572 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margerie Colmer è nata il nel 1500 nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury, aveva 80 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, aveva 76 anni. Lei sposato John Houghton nel 1522, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1572, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margerie Colmerが1500年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesburyは80歳，母Lady Elizabeth de Molyneuxは76歳であった。1522年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドでJohn Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1572年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアで73歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margerie Colmer(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury(은)는 80세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux(은)는 76세였다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 John Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margerie Colmer nasceu em 1500, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury, tinha 80 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, tinha 76 anos. Ela casou-se com John Houghton em 1522, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1572, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margerie Colmer родилась в 1500 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury было 80 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, 76. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Houghton в 1522 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1572 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margerie Colmer nació en 1500, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Christopher Southworth Lord of Samlesbury, tenía 80 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth de Molyneux, tenía 76 años. Se casó con John Houghton en 1522, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1572, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
